rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid scopes: component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees, implementation annexes for bindings
Implementation-level bindings should use assign only with existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
generic_rules: Avoid placing implementation-specific references in component type contracts
Ensure AGREE type names match AADL scalar types (int, real, bool)
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Guarantee statements should relate visible inputs to visible outputs in type scope
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent paths or implementation-only features in component type annexes
Do not use invalid or unresolved identifiers in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
Component type vs implementation scope distinctions for features
